heading: Education of other minors who are Senate employees
label: 4903 Education of other minors who are Senate employees
text: The facilities provided for the education of Congressional and Supreme Court pages shall be available from and after , also for the education of such other minors who are Senate employees as may be certified by the Secretary of the Senate to receive such education.January 2, 1947
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 88b of this titleThe first paragraph of this section is based on act .Mar. 22, 1947The second paragraph was based on H. Res. No. 279, Ninety-eighth Congress, , enacted into permanent law by . See 1996 Amendment note below.July 21, 1983Pub. L. 98–367

Amendments1996—, in first par., substituted “Senate employees” for “congressional employees” and struck out “and the Clerk of the House of Representatives” after “Secretary of the Senate”, and struck out second par. which read as follows: “This section shall not apply to any minor who is an employee of the House of Representatives or to any educational facility under the House of Representatives Page Board.”Pub. L. 104–186
